trends.summary: The S&P 500 is facing increased volatility and bearish sentiment as traders react to rising oil prices, geopolitical instability, and a broader rotation out of overbought AI-related sectors. Market participants are actively debating whether current pullbacks represent a long-overdue healthy correction or the potential end of a prolonged rally amid concerns over unsustainable market valuations and shifting monetary conditions.

message.body:
$TSLA short term bull flag pattern has fizzled out. Desperate chart readers calling INV h&S at resistance. Bulls attempting to hold on to 420.70.

Not sure what the news will be but this could get nasty shorter term. Short @ 420.70 via March PUTS.

Bulls will be saying "watch for the bounce at 382.80s"
...then 360s will come swiftly.

$SLV type move IMO. 

When/if SpaceX goes public, hefty % of TSLA investor funds will undoubtedly FOMO into the new name. How much “Elon Exposure” is safe for your portfolio at once?

messages.body: $TSLA offering?
$TSLA  call wall 425

$DXYZ Base Case ($2T SpaceX / $850B Anthropic)
SpaceX at $2T is a 5x re-mark on a $400B carry, adding ~$9.44/share. Anthropic at $850B is a 4.5x re-mark on a $189B carry, adding ~$15.58/share. Everything else gets a modest 1.25x blended mark in a world where both headline names are printing large, adding ~$4.X/share.
Total increment ~$29 on top of the $24.56 base. Forward NAV: ~$57.

Bull Case ($4T SpaceX / $2T Anthropic)
Double both targets. SpaceX at 10x carry adds ~$21.X/share. Anthropic at 10.6x carry adds ~$43/share — this single line item is what drives the gap between the two scenarios, because the Anthropic carry is extremely stale relative to where the private market is already trading. Everything else gets a 1.35x blended mark, adding ~$6/share.
Total increment ~$70 on top of the $24.56 base. Forward NAV: ~$95-110.

$VCX $RVI $TSLA
